Appearances:
Plaintiff Chris Dressel is present.
Ryan Mayberry representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Heather Bohannon AKA H. Bohannon is present.
Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has "partially" settled, no agreement has been signed because tenant must have husband agree to terms of potential settlement. The trial date will remain on calendar.
